shorts.title: Tickets on sale for UNC’s designer purse bingo
shorts.title_distilled: Tickets on sale for UNC’s designer purse bingo.
shorts.description: Tickets are on sale for United Neighborhood Centers of Northeastern Pennsylvania’s fourth annual designer purse bingo, presented by Grimm Construction, on Friday, April 10, at Holy Cross High School, 501 E. Drinker St., Dunmore. Doors open at 5:30 p.m. and bingo begins at 6:30. This year, guests will have the opportunity to participate in a Louis Vuitton Neverfull Bag raffle, with winners not required to be present to claim the prize. The event is open to guests 21 and older. Tickets are $35 in advance and $40 at the door. Admission includes 15 rounds of bingo. Additional opportunities to win […]

shorts.title: Clipboard, March 7, 2026
shorts.description: Abingtons Insulin pump support group: Insulin Pump Support Group meeting, March 19, 6 p.m., Abington Community Library. Guest speaker will be Emily Gelatt, who brings professional expertise and a desire to help people understand insurance and Medicare benefits. Carbondale Bingo fundraiser: Trinity Episcopal Church, 58 River St., cash bingo, March 22, with a grand prize of $1,000. Entrance tickets are $25 and include 10 regular games with a $100 prize. Grand prize and specials boards are sold separately. Doors will open at 1:30 p.m. and games start at 2:30. There will also be a 50/50, snack bar and door prizes. […]

shorts.title: Wallenpaupack Area swimmers win 2026 Mulrine Award
shorts.title_distilled: Wallenpaupack Area swimmers win 2026 Mulrine Award.
shorts.description: At the Les Richards Swim Tournament at Scranton High School in February, Lackawanna Swim PIAA presented the Gary Mulrine Sportsmanship Award to the Wallenpaupack Area High School boys and girls swim team, which was selected by league PIAA swim officials. Mulrine served for many years as swim coach and official in Lackawanna County. Les Richards, the namesake for the tournament, has served the region in many aspects of swimming. The Wallenpaupack head coach is Stephanie Campbell and assistant coaches are Emily Kotcho, Hunter Vargo and Ali Parkes. Team captains of the boys are Jacob Eckes and Jasper Hathaway; the girls […]
shorts.content: At the Les Richards Swim Tournament at Scranton High School in February, Lackawanna Swim PIAA presented the Gary Mulrine Sportsmanship Award to the Wallenpaupack Area High School boys and girls swim team, which was selected by league PIAA swim officials. Mulrine served for many years as swim coach and official in Lackawanna County. Les Richards, the namesake for the tournament, has served the region in many aspects of swimming. shorts.title: NCAA BASKETBALL: Lady Royals dismantle Framingham State in first round
shorts.title_distilled: NCAA BASKETBALL: Lady Royals dismantle Framingham State in first round.
shorts.description: SCRANTON — Things could not have gone better for the University of Scranton women’s basketball team in their NCAA Division III tournament opener. The Lady Royals turned in a record performance in dismantling Framingham State, 104-39, in the first round Friday night at the John Long Center. Five players scored in double figures for Scranton (28-0), which set a program record for points in a NCAA tournament game. The previous mark was 103 points in a win over Waynesburg in the first round March 5, 1993. Scranton also had 101 points in an AIAW game — the forerunner to the […]
shorts.content: SCRANTON — Things could not have gone better for the University of Scranton women’s basketball team in their NCAA Division III tournament opener. The Lady Royals turned in a record performance in dismantling Framingham State, 104-39, in the first round Friday night at the John Long Center. Five players scored in double figures for Scranton (28-0), which set a program record for points in a NCAA tournament game. shorts.title: PIAA GIRLS BASKETBALL: Dunmore, Mountain View advance; Scranton bounced
shorts.title_distilled: PIAA GIRLS BASKETBALL: Dunmore, Mountain View advance; Scranton bounced.
shorts.description: Amanda Dempsey connected on three of her four 3-pointers in the second quarter and finished with 14 points, leading Dunmore to a 36-33 win over Mount Carmel on Friday night in the PIAA Class 3A girls basketball first round. Jackie Brown added seven points, and Janaya Martin, the hero of the District 2 championship game, added six points, including four in the fourth quarter, for the Lady Bucks. Dunmore (23-3) advances to Tuesday’s second round and will play Executive Education (18-7), the District 11 champion, at a site and time to be determined. Dempsey scored nine points, all on 3-pointers, […]
shorts.content: Amanda Dempsey connected on three of her four 3-pointers in the second quarter and finished with 14 points, leading Dunmore to a 36-33 win over Mount Carmel on Friday night in the PIAA Class 3A girls basketball first round. Jackie Brown added seven points, and Janaya Martin, the hero of the District 2 championship game, added six points, including four in the fourth quarter, for the Lady Bucks. Dunmore (23-3) advances to Tuesday’s second round and will play Executive Education (18-7), the District 11 champion, at a site and time to be determined. Dempsey scored nine points, all on 3-pointers, […]

shorts.title: PIAA CLASS 4A BOYS: Doherty lifts Prep into second round; Valley View moves on
shorts.title_distilled: PIAA CLASS 4A BOYS: Doherty lifts Prep into second round; Valley View moves on.
shorts.description: SCRANTON – Packy Doherty drained his final shot inside of the Xavier Center as the horn sounded to sub him out. With the Scranton Prep student section shouting and chanting his name, the Cavalier took a moment to soak it all in. One final time. One final moment inside a gym where he reigned supreme the last four seasons. The senior gave his fans a show in the second half of Friday’s PIAA Class 4A boys’ basketball first-round game against Schuylkill Valley. Doherty drained shots from every square inch of Keller Court, hitting all five of his attempts in the […]

shorts.title: Three charged, Scranton shooting investigation ongoing
shorts.title_distilled: Three charged, Scranton shooting investigation ongoing.
shorts.description: SCRANTON, LACKAWANNA COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU) — A woman and two juveniles are facing charges as police continue to investigate a shooting that left a 16-year-old dead. On Thursday, February 26, detectives charged three people as they continued to investigate the death of Dylan Smith that occurred in December 2025. The Scranton Police Department said 24-year-old Mariah Cortes [...]
shorts.content: SCRANTON, LACKAWANNA COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU) — A woman and two juveniles are facing charges as police continue to investigate a shooting that left a 16-year-old dead. On Thursday, February 26, detectives charged three people as they continued to investigate the death of Dylan Smith that occurred in December 2025. The Scranton Police Department said 24-year-old Mariah Cortes [...]
